title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Columbia Asia Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Doctor with drive and ambition, Columbia Asia Advisory Limited in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
